title: Hub VerificationAddEthAddressBody
description: Contains the data required to verify ownership of an Ethereum or Solana address. The verification process requires a cryptographic signature from the blockchain address and includes the block hash at the time of signing for timestamp verification.

address.title: Blockchain Address
address.description: The Ethereum (0x-prefixed) or Solana address that the user is claiming ownership of. Must match the address that produced the signature.

ethSignature.title: Cryptographic Signature
ethSignature.description: Base64-encoded signature produced by the blockchain address, proving ownership. For Ethereum, this is an ECDSA signature of a specific message format.

blockHash.title: Block Hash
blockHash.description: The hash of the most recent block when the signature was created. Used to verify the approximate time of signature creation.
